title: Basic Night Vision Goggles
description: Goggles with infinite night vision and an on/off key bind
body:
###### [Click here for Hardcore version of this mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-night-vision-goggles)

# [Basic Night Vision Goggles!](https://modrinth.com/mod/basic-night-vision-goggles)

- Infinite Night Vision

- Default toggle key "V"

- 1.20.1 Requires **[Curios API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios)**

- 1.21.1 Requires **[Adorned (Curios)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/adorned)**

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c63525d56dd652a12e9a0fcdf3fea4181b57fe.gif)

<details>
<summary>Newest Update!</summary>

Version 1.1.0 has added colorful Night Vision Goggles

![nvg colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1df073b54ad956ccc3364f409e4682966a3fefc6.png)

You can swap colors without crafting a new NVG

![Lens Swap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed90bdad731934fdbdef2c90da3874cb6e30d030.gif)


</details>
